calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Curtis Dowling, Esq. for Plaintiff: Laramar Urban Specialty Partners.
Plaintiff's Witness Jerry Deal was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Justin Mitchell and Elizabeth Midgley.

After hearing the testimony, considering of the evidence and Exhibits presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 725 Ellis Street, Unit #408, San Francisco, CA 94109.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent - $2,900.00
Holdover Damages - $2,948.13
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Off Calendar
